General.Name: HK Asia Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Moon Inc., an investment holding company, engages in the wholesale and retail sale of the pre-paid products in Hong Kong. The company offers SIM cards and top-up vouchers that enable users to make local and international phone calls, as well as access mobile data services. It provides its products to domestic helpers, local users travelling abroad, and tourists. The company was formerly known as HK Asia Holdings Limited and changed its name to Moon Inc. in June 2025. Moon Inc. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Admiralty, Hong Kong.
